历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science/physics category were approximately 11696 → 15627 → 11358 → 13622 → 20622. From 2021 to 2022, it shifted back by about 3931 places; in 2023, it moved significantly forward to 11358; in 2024, it slightly shifted back to 13622; in 2025, it shifted significantly back to 20622 (about 7000 places back from 2024), showing drastic fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 20622; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for science/physics category were 92 → 95 → 94 → 108 → 115, showing a gradual expansion trend; in 2026, the physics category plans 85 students and the medical category 23, totaling 108, a reduction of about 6.1% compared to 115 in 2025. The reduction in enrollment means slightly eased competition, which has a forward-shifting effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked about 74th in 2026 (78 in 2021 → 75 in 2022 → 69 in 2023 → 71 in 2024 → 73 in 2025 → 74 in 2026), with stable rankings in the 70–80 range in recent years, making it a mid-to-upper comprehensive university; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat positive: the men's volleyball team won the championship in the university volleyball league, enhancing the university's sports reputation; Douyin popularity ranked 43rd (relatively hot), with short video exposure mainly focusing on campus environment and volleyball championship, reflecting a rise in application attention. In 2023, there was somewhat negative public opinion due to admission gaps, but in 2026 there are no obvious negative signals; Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only discipline at A- or above at this university; clinical medicine, stomatology, and other medical majors have very high admission rankings in Guangxi (in 2025, stomatology at 5738, clinical medicine at 13302), and the strength of medical disciplines is recognized.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation, clinical medicine, stomatology, and other majors continue to be highly recommended; civil engineering, biology, chemistry, environment, and materials are clearly discouraged. Nanchang University offers a full range of popular majors such as computer science, electrical engineering, and clinical medicine in Guangxi, which helps attract high-scoring students. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Guangxi general college entrance examination is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,400 from 2025 (about 379,600); estimated by recent proportions, physics category candidates are about 269,000 (260,400 in 2025), an increase of about 3.3%, slightly intensifying competition. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, relatively close to Guangxi, belonging to the central-south region, with moderate regional preference; the university's enrollment plan in Guangxi accounts for a small proportion (115 in physics category in 2025), making it a medium-scale enrollment from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation inertia of the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the planned enrollment reduction of about 6.1% in 2026 (forward shift of about 750 places), the increase in Guangxi physics category candidates by about 3.3% (backward shift pressure), and the rise in application heat due to a somewhat positive reputation, the reduction effect and the candidate increase effect roughly offset each other but the reduction is slightly stronger. Also considering the possible partial correction after the abnormal backward shift in 2025 rankings, and making small adjustments based on the increase in candidate numbers and reputation warming, the predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is about 20069, with a range of 19569–20569.

Nanchang University's Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline, although its social popularity is average, its disciplinary strength is outstanding, suitable for candidates interested in the food field.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Arts/History Category were approximately 1656 → 1961 → 2675 → 2541 → 2475. From 2021 to 2022, it shifted back by about 305 places, significantly dropped to 2675 in 2023, moved forward to 2541 in 2024, and continued to move forward to 2475 in 2025, showing a slow forward trend in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2475; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Arts/History Category were 21 → 24 → 23 → 18 → 18, stabilizing at 18 from 2024 onward; the 2026 History Category plan remains 18, unchanged from 2025. The unchanged plan has no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 74th, with rankings stable in the 70–80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle comprehensive universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive: positive events such as the men's volleyball team winning the championship have increased the university's exposure; Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), and application attention has increased. In 2022, the reputation was neutral/mixed (response to Li Jiaqi's academic qualification doubts), in 2023 it was slightly negative (admission cutoff), but by 2026 there are no obvious negative signals; Food Science and Engineering A+ is the university's strongest discipline, but the liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Accounting, Finance, etc.) are weakly related to this discipline; Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and other disciplines have not received A-class ratings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Accounting is divided: Law is relatively hot but highly competitive, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended (advantage for civil service exams), Accounting is divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,400 compared to 2025; based on recent proportions, it is estimated that History Category candidates are about 123,000 (119,200 in 2025), an increase of about 3.3%, slightly intensifying competition. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, relatively close to Guangxi, belonging to the Central South region; the university only enrolls 18 History Category students in Guangxi, which is a small enrollment scale from other provinces, and ranking fluctuations are greatly affected by the application intentions of individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the slow forward trend of rankings in 2024–2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the increase of about 3.3% in Guangxi History Category candidates (pressure to shift rankings back), and the slightly positive reputation leading to increased application heat, the candidate increase effect slightly dominates. With minor adjustments based on the increase in candidate numbers and reputation warming, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 2505, with a range of 2005–3005.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Nanchang University's medical programs in Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region from 2021 to 2025 were 11696, 14206, 11108, 44178, and 31392 respectively, with corresponding enrollment plans of 21, 22, 23, 29, and 28 students. In 2024, due to Guangxi's first implementation of the new college entrance examination reform and the addition of the nursing major, the minimum ranking for medical programs jumped significantly to 44178; in 2025, the nursing admission ranking rebounded to 31392, driving the overall ranking upward. In 2026, the enrollment plan for medical programs is reduced to 23 students (a decrease of 5 from 2025, a reduction of approximately 17.9%), a substantial contraction that will intensify competition and push the minimum admission ranking further upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is the only national 211 Project key university in Jiangxi Province and is also selected as a national Double First-Class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking in the middle to upper tier nationwide. The university has a deep foundation in medical disciplines, with advantageous majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology, enjoying high visibility and recognition in the region, and exerting strong appeal to Guangxi candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising steadily, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology experiencing particularly intense competition. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang, the capital of Jiangxi Province, in the central region, relatively close to Guangxi with convenient transportation, making it an important choice for Guangxi candidates applying to medical schools outside the province. The overall reduction in enrollment for medical programs in 2026 will further raise the admission threshold for each major.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model calculation and analysis of recent ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Nanchang University's medical programs in Guangxi in 2026 will be approximately 27829, with a fluctuation range of 27329 to 28329. Due to the significant reduction in enrollment plans, the ranking will further rise compared to 2025 (making admission more difficult), and candidates should position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
